name: Southwestern Beef Hash
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown ground beef and onion in a large skillet over medium heat until no longer pink. Drain.
2. Stir in potatoes, salt, and pepper. Increase the heat to medium-high and cook 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in salsa. Cook 8 to 10 more minutes until potatoes are lightly browned, stirring occasionally.
4. Garnish with green onions and black olives if desired.
Yield: 4 servings.
